Title: Verify homepage display
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Verify that the homepage is displayed.

Title: Verify navigation to settings page
Preconditions: The application is launched and the homepage is displayed.
Test Steps:
1. Click the settings button on the homepage.
2. Verify that the settings page is displayed.
Expected Result: The settings page is displayed correctly.

Title: Verify navigation to detailed location page
Preconditions: The application is launched and the homepage is displayed.
Test Steps:
1. Click a location on the homepage.
2. Verify that the detailed location page is displayed.
Expected Result: The detailed location page is displayed correctly.

Title: Verify navigation to Pathfinder page
Preconditions: The application is launched and the homepage is displayed.
Test Steps:
1. Click the Pathfinder button on the homepage.
2. Verify that the Pathfinder page is displayed.
Expected Result: The Pathfinder page is displayed correctly.

Title: Verify Pathfinder suggestion availability
Test Steps:
1. Click the Pathfinder button.
2. Verify that the question is displayed.
3. Provide an answer.
4. Verify that a suggested location is displayed (if available).
Expected Result: If a suggestion is available, the suggested location is displayed correctly.

Title: Verify Pathfinder suggestion unavailability
Test Steps:
1. Click the Pathfinder button.
2. Verify that the question is displayed.
3. Provide an answer.
4. Verify that no suggested location is displayed (if no suggestion is available).
Expected Result: If no suggestion is available, no suggested location is displayed correctly.

Title: Verify navigation to system map
Preconditions: The detailed location page is displayed.
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Navigate" button on the detailed location page.
2. Verify that the system map is displayed.
Expected Result: The system map is displayed correctly.

Title: Verify opening Yelp in a browser
Preconditions: The detailed location page is displayed.
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Open in Browser" button on the detailed location page.
2. Verify that the Yelp website is opened in a browser.
Expected Result: The Yelp website is opened in a browser correctly.

Title: Verify calling a business
Preconditions: The detailed location page is displayed.
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Call Business" button on the detailed location page.
2. Verify that the call is initiated to the business.
Expected Result: The call is initiated to the business correctly.

Title: Verify returning to homepage
Preconditions: The detailed location page is displayed.
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Indietro" button on the detailed location page.
2. Verify that the homepage is displayed.

Title: Verify modifying preferences
Preconditions: The detailed location page is displayed.
Test Steps:
1. Click the "Like/Dislike" button on the detailed location page.
2. Verify that the preference for the location is updated.
Expected Result: The preference for the location is updated correctly.
